programme.title: Firing Line With Margaret Hoover
programme.desc: Constitutional scholars Jeffrey Rosen and Yuval Levin discuss America's founding documents, why the ideas behind the Declaration of Independence and Constitution matter 250 years later, and the challenges that lie ahead for the American experiment.

programme.title: Finding Your Roots With Henry Louis Gates, Jr.
programme.desc: Rebecca Hall and Lee Daniels research their family histories.

programme.title: Great Performances
programme.sub-title: Now Hear This: The Iceland Sound
programme.desc: Uncovering how volcanoes and tight-knit communities inspire its artists.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: American Masters
programme.sub-title: Michael Tilson Thomas: Where Now Is
programme.desc: The life and career of Michael Tilson Thomas, music director of the San Francisco Symphony, founder and artistic director of the New World Symphony and conductor laureate of the London Symphony Orchestra.

rating.system: Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: History With David Rubenstein
programme.desc: David Rubenstein interviews renowned scholars and public figures in the U.S.

programme.title: Amanpour and Company
programme.desc: Christiane Amanpour leads discussions about world issues and interviews with global leaders.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: This daily news program, produced by Japanese public broadcaster NHK, focuses on headlines and current events in Japan and other Asian countries. English-speaking presenters also cover other areas of interest, including business news, science and technology trends, sports highlights, and global weather forecasts.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Fred and Mr. McFeely visit a recycling center.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.sub-title: Pets and Pests; Go Fly a Kite
programme.desc: Arthur enlists the help of an expert mouse catcher; Binky, Muffy and Ladonna find a kite in the park.

programme.title: Wild Kratts
programme.desc: The Kratt brothers use a new archery skill to rescue baby animals from Donita Donata's yacht.

programme.title: Weather Hunters
programme.sub-title: Through Rain, Sun, Snow or Hail
programme.desc: Benny becomes enamored with the mail carrier, and wonders how she delivers the mail in different weather conditions.

programme.title: Lyla in the Loop
programme.sub-title: Cub Chuck Hustle; Lyla the Lefty
programme.desc: Lyla has to help multiple people but rushes each task, which makes things worse; Lyla must use her left hand after hurting her right wrist.

programme.title: Carl the Collector
programme.sub-title: Show and Smell; The Campfire Conundrum
programme.desc: Carl takes his friends on an "Amazing Smell Tour of Fuzzytown," but Lotta doesn't agree with Carl's list of the best smells; Carl and his friends go on a camping trip.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Daniel Learns to Ask First; Friends Ask First
programme.desc: Daniel takes a spoon away from Margaret, which makes her cry; Teacher Harriet explains that you should ask first before taking something away from someone.

programme.title: Phoebe & Jay
programme.desc: Phoebe learns what privacy signs are and how to use them to communicate to neighbors; Jay gets nervous about getting a haircut.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Elmo tries to win a race without eating his sandwich, but learns that eating healthy food will give him energy; Cookie Monster tries to eat the sandwich for himself.

Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Work It Out Wombats!
programme.sub-title: Cause and Effect Machine; Riddles of the Treeborhood
programme.desc: The Wombats build a Cause and Effect machine; Super's best friend Chanaa pays a visit.

programme.title: Relish
programme.desc: Old-school techniques of stone-grinding and making the perfect sourdough; using Baker's Field Flour in a delicate tart.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Hosts Bridget Lancaster and Julia Collin Davison make a plum-ginger pie with whole-wheat lattice-top crust; small stand mixers; pear crisp.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Grilled brined pork chops with garlic-herb oil; reviewing ceramic skillets; seasonal rhubarb shortcakes with buttermilk whipped cream.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Zucchini pie in Greece; sea bream in Istanbul; Barcelona's viral bomba.

programme.title: Outside: Beyond the Lens
programme.desc: Jeff, Zack and Dave, along with local guides, discover the history and culture of Hvar's past.

programme.title: In the Americas With David Yetman
programme.sub-title: Imperiled Refuges: Islets in the Sea of Cortes
programme.desc: Islands and waters of Mexico's northern Gulf of California provide refuge for sea creatures reliant on fish stocks and beset with the uncertainties of climate change.

programme.title: Ireland With Michael
programme.desc: A master bodhran maker; dining aboard the Pullman Restaurant's historic train cars; walking the Cliffs of Moher; sharing music with Franjo Reid and Pat Sweeney.

programme.title: Rick Steves' Europe
programme.desc: Jogging in Hyde Park; British Museum; Victoria and Albert Museum; East End food tour; celebrating London's regeneration.

programme.title: Samantha Brown's Places to Love
programme.desc: The tiny railroad town of Goffs in the eastern Mojave Desert; Amboy; the only piece of Route 66 that runs through a military installation; Elmer's Bottle Tree Ranch.

programme.title: Relish
programme.sub-title: Hawaii's Beef Stew and Moco Loco
programme.desc: Traditional beef stew; chef Chris Ikeda puts a modern spin on the classic loco moco.

programme.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
programme.desc: Romanian creme fraiche cake; a new spin on apple pie -- Romanian apple pie with cinnamon and walnuts; meringue-topped cake wtih cherries.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Kale salad with avocado and pistachios; marinara sauce; no-mess cheesy baked chicken wings.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.sub-title: Walpole ADU: An ADU Takes Shape
programme.desc: Kevin demos a wall in the primary bedroom; framing an exterior wall to tie old and new spaces together; reviewing shared plumbing for the ADU; burying a new 400-amp service to feed both homes.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Turning a flower vase on the lathe; how to start seeds indoors for spring; breaking down common mortar cracks in fireplace hearths and surrounds; upgrading a garage door opener by adding a Wi-Fi hub.

programme.title: Horizons From PBS News
programme.desc: Science, health, technology and environment experts and professionals address issues such as artificial intelligence, medicine and climate science.

programme.title: American Grown: My Job Depends on Ag
programme.desc: The future of the agriculture industry and stories of how it touches us all far beyond the table.

programme.title: Austin City Limits
programme.desc: Singer-songwriter Jason Isbell and his band 400 Unit present songs from "Weathervanes.".

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When the author of a book that sparked a nationwide treasure hunt is found dead, Barnaby must unravel clues to find the killer among a group of dedicated seekers.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown is determined to unmask a mortal being when a supposed vampire strikes in the village.

programme.title: Papa Ray's Vintage Vinyl Roadshow
programme.desc: Record stores that keep the traditions of blues, soul and rock and roll alive and well, including Memphis Records on Beale Street, Shangri La Records and Goner Records in Memphis, Tenn.

programme.title: Magic Moments -- The Best of '50s Pop (My Music Presents)
programme.desc: Phyllis McGuire, Pat Boone and Nick Clooney host a trip back to the 1950s with a mix of live performance and archival footage featuring classic moments from artists such as Perry Como, Debbie Reynolds and the McGuire Sisters.

programme.title: Magic Moments -- The Best of '50s Pop (My Music Presents)
programme.desc: Phyllis McGuire, Pat Boone and Nick Clooney host a trip back to the 1950s with a mix of live performance and archival footage featuring classic moments from artists such as Perry Como, Debbie Reynolds and the McGuire Sisters.

programme.sub-title: Mister Rogers Talks About the Environment
programme.desc: Marine botanist Sylvia Earle and Fred Rogers snorkel off the Florida Keys.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: When Binky's family adopts a baby girl from China, Binky worries about how his life will change and if his new sister will like him.

programme.title: Weather Hunters

programme.sub-title: Everett's Swim Lesson; Miss Emmaline's New Beginning
programme.desc: Everett faces his fear of water by taking a swimming lesson; Lyla doesn't want Miss Emmaline to move.

programme.title: Carl the Collector
programme.sub-title: Whole Lotta Lotta; Leaf It to Carl
programme.desc: Lotta is determined to show Skyler that she is more than just "headphone girl"; the new kid in school causes a hullabaloo on the playground.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Daniel Uses a Bathroom; The Neighborhood Concert
programme.desc: Daniel uses a different bathroom at the train station and Juan uses the bathroom at the Music Shop; O uses the bathroom at Jodi's house.

programme.title: Phoebe & Jay
programme.desc: Phoebe and Jay use Miss Jean's field guide to identify their new butterfly friend; Phoebe gets courage to perform at the talent show.

programme.title: Inside California Education
programme.desc: A field trip to the ancestral lands of the Agua Caliente Band of Cahuilla Indians; Fresno City College's new campus; civic action projects.

programme.title: Joseph Rosendo's Steppin' Out
programme.desc: Joseph Rosendo travels to picturesque and ethnically rich destinations around the world.

programme.title: Wild Foods
programme.desc: Spring brings unique forageable foods like ramps, morels and fiddleheads; maintaining forest health and preserving its ecology makes foraging possible.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Climbing the ancient ruins of Uxmal, an ancient Mayan city; swimming; tamales; making cochinita pibil using the ancient technique of cooking meat with heated rocks buried underground.

programme.title: From That Small Island: The Story Of The Irish
programme.desc: A snapshot of Europe in the year 1000 and Ireland's place within it; the rise of the Tudors, which coincided with the Protestant Reformation.

programme.title: Life Unearthed With Ariel Waldman
programme.desc: Often overlooked, North America's tallgrass prairies are among the most dynamic and biodiverse ecosystems on Earth.

programme.title: Nature
programme.desc: Exploring the unique evolutionary journey of woodpeckers and the role they play in every ecosystem, except Antarctica and Australia.

programme.title: Grantchester on Masterpiece
programme.desc: When a student from a prestigious college is found dead, Will and Geordie must infiltrate the murky world of campus politics to find the killer; Leonard returns from Marrakech.

programme.title: Grantchester on Masterpiece
programme.desc: Will and Leonard witness a deadly hit-and-run in Grantchester; Geordie traces the car to a pair of decidedly dysfunctional brothers, whose house lies far off the beaten path; Will and Geordie both struggle as unwelcome guests look set to stay.

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: An expectant father receives a life-threatening diagnosis; Trixie assists a female wrestler after a headlock goes wrong; Dr. Turner learns shocking news that implicates the future of the maternity house.

programme.title: Compass Points From PBS News
programme.desc: Experts analyze prominent international affairs topics and America's role in a shifting world.

programme.desc: Jeff, Zack and Dave, along with local guides, discover the history and culture of Hvar's past.

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: A new cohort of junior doctors join the midwives, including Timothy, who observes the contrast between clinical medicine and compassionate care at Nonnatus House; Violet announces her plan to shadow the midwives.

programme.title: MaryLand on Masterpiece
programme.desc: When sisters Becca and Rosaline receive shocking news about their mother, they fly to the Isle of Man to find out more and are reunited in their sorrow after years of distance.

programme.title: The Count of Monte Cristo on Masterpiece
programme.desc: Edmond locates Gaston, Villefort's illegitimate child, who has grown up to be a thief; Danglars discovers Fernand's treacherous deeds in Algeria and reveals all to the press.
